holdings.infoBox: XVV is an equity ETF with a total of 445 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.89%, Apple at 7.50%, Microsoft at 5.11%, Amazon.com at 4.14%, and Alphabet at 3.73%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Select Screened S&P 500 ETF (XVV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Sustainability Screened index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US large-caps caps screened for sustainability and excluding those with exposure to certain controversial business activities. XVV was launched on Sep 22, 2020 and is issued by BlackRock.
